items.title_en: A backdoor in a LinkedIn job offer
items.title_zh: LinkedIn招聘广告中的后门
items.summary_en: A backdoor was discovered embedded in a LinkedIn job offer, illustrating how the recruiting process can be weaponized to compromise targets. The post explains how attackers used the job posting to deliver malware or harvest credentials, highlighting the risk of social engineering on professional networks. It underscores the need for stricter validation of job postings and better phishing defenses by platforms and users.
items.summary_zh: 在 LinkedIn 的一个招聘信息中发现了后门，暴露了招聘流程如何被用来对目标进行入侵。攻击者可能通过该职位发布来投放恶意软件或窃取凭据，凸显了职业社交网络中的钓鱼风险。强调平台和用户都需加强对招聘信息的验证与安全防护。

items.title_en: John Carmack on Fabrice Bellard
items.title_zh: 约翰·卡马克谈法布里斯·贝拉尔
items.summary_en: John Carmack recently highlighted Fabrice Bellard, praising his extraordinary contributions to open-source software and emulation. The exchange spotlights Bellard’s influence across projects like QEMU, FFmpeg, and high-efficiency code, and it underscores how a few individuals quietly catalyze big leaps in systems and tooling.
items.summary_zh: 约翰·卡马克最近在社交媒体上高度评价了法布里斯·贝拉尔，称赞他在开源与仿真领域的卓越贡献。此番互动凸显贝拉尔对 QEMU、FFmpeg 等项目的影响力，以及少数天才对底层系统与工具链带来的深远突破。

items.title_en: The time the x86 emulator team found code so bad they fixed it during emulation
items.title_zh: X86 模拟器团队在仿真中直接修复糟糕代码的故事
items.summary_en: While running legacy x86 code, the emulator team uncovered a section so badly written that it risked correctness. They patched the behavior directly in the emulator during the debugging session, effectively fixing the issue without modifying the source. The story highlights how emulation can surface design flaws and enable quick, in-situ fixes for stubborn code.
items.summary_zh: 在仿真环境中运行遗留的 x86 代码时，团队发现了一段异常糟糕的实现，严重影响正确性。他们在仿真过程中直接对行为进行了修正，几乎是在现场完成了修复，而无需改动源代码。这个故事展示了仿真工具在暴露设计缺陷并实现快速就地修复方面的强大力量。

items.title_en: Iroh 1.0
items.title_zh: Iroh 1.0
items.summary_en: Iroh 1.0 marks an early version of a new AI assistant platform, signaling growth in developer-friendly AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: Iroh 1.0 标志着一个新型 AI 助手平台的早期版本，预示着面向开发者的 AI 工具生态在成长。

items.title_en: I Could've Rickrolled the FIFA World Cup. All I Needed Was My ID
items.title_zh: 我几乎可以把 FIFA 世界杯变成 Rickroll 的。只需要我的 ID
items.summary_en: An ID-based vulnerability around a major sporting site allowed simple manipulation of content to surface a Rickroll, illustrating how predictable identifiers can enable unexpected redirects or access. The post underscores the risks of URL-level identifiers and highlights the need for robust authentication and access controls in large public-facing apps.
items.summary_zh: 仅凭一个 ID 就能在 FIFA 世界杯相关页面触发跳转到 Rickroll，暴露了基于 ID 的访问控制薄弱和可预测行为的风险。这说明在面向公众的应用中，需加强认证与访问控制，避免通过简单标识符被滥用。

items.title_en: Commodore Releases Flip Phone
items.title_zh: Commodore 推出翻盖手机
items.summary_en: Commodore launches a flip phone, reviving the classic form factor with modern internals. The device targets nostalgia-driven buyers and hobbyists, signaling renewed interest in branded hardware.
items.summary_zh: Commodore 推出翻盖手机，将复古外形与现代硬件结合，面向爱好者与收藏者。该机型借助怀旧品牌，试图在现今市场复兴对该类硬件的兴趣。

items.title_en: Feds freaked over Fable 5 after simple 'fix this code' prompt, not jailbreak
items.title_zh: 联邦机构对 Fable 5 的简单“修复这段代码”提示反应过激
items.summary_en: A researcher notes that a harmless prompt triggered an alarm from federal agents, highlighting how AI safety testing can produce outsized responses. The incident shows the fragility of risk perceptions and the need for clearer testing guidelines and boundaries.
items.summary_zh: 一位研究者指出，一个无害的“修复这段代码”提示竟让联邦机构产生过度反应，暴露了 AI 安全测试可能引发的极端反应。此事凸显风险认知的脆弱性，以及需要更清晰的测试边界和准则。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Has anyone replaced Claude/GPT with a local model for daily coding?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：有没有人用本地模型替代 Claude/GPT 进行日常编码？
items.summary_en: Users discuss replacing cloud-based copilots with locally hosted models for everyday coding tasks. Local models can improve privacy and reduce latency, but may require beefier hardware and careful tuning to approach Claude/GPT capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 社区在讨论是否可用本地部署的模型来替代云端的助理进行日常编码。虽然本地模型提升隐私与降低延迟的潜力很大，但往往需要更强大的硬件与精心调优以接近 Claude/GPT 的能力。

items.title_en: TinyWind: A pixel pirate sailing game with real wind physics (380k+ kms sailed)
items.title_zh: TinyWind：一款具备真实风力物理的像素海盗航海游戏（航行里程超过38万公里）
items.summary_en: TinyWind delivers a pixel-art sailing experience driven by plausible wind physics, giving a tactile sense of sailing. With over 380,000 kilometers sailed by players, it demonstrates strong engagement with physics-based gameplay and sparks ideas for indie developers to model wind without heavy graphics.
items.summary_zh: 这款像素风帆船游戏以贴近真实的风力物理为核心，带来更具手感的航海体验。玩家累计航行里程已超38万公里，体现了对基于物理的玩法的强烈投入，并为独立开发者在无需繁重美术资源的前提下实现可信风场提供了思路。

items.title_en: SpaceX to buy Cursor AI coding agent operator Anysphere for $60B
items.title_zh: SpaceX 将以 60 亿美元收购 Anysphere 的 AI 编码代理运营商
items.summary_en: SpaceX plans to acquire Anysphere, an AI coding agent operator, for $60 billion, signaling a push into AI-assisted software development tooling. The move underscores how aerospace players are betting on developer productivity platforms to accelerate high-assurance software workflows.
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 计划以 600 亿美元收购 AI 编码代理运营商 Anysphere，标志着其在 AI 辅助软件开发工具方面的布局。此举凸显航天巨头正押注开发者效率平台来加速高安全性软件工作流。

items.title_en: Banned Book Library in a Wi-Fi Smart Light Bulb
items.title_zh: Wi‑Fi 智能灯泡中的被禁书库
items.summary_en: A Wi‑Fi smart light bulb secretly hosts a library of banned or hard-to-find texts, turning a household device into a portable knowledge archive. The project provokes thoughts about censorship, distributed aesthetics, and the potential of IoT as a stealth repository.
items.summary_zh: 一颗具备 Wi‑Fi 的智能灯泡成了一个迷你禁书库，将文本打包进常见的物联网设备。该项目展示了硬件与本地网络如何成为信息存储与传播的新载体，也引发对数字审查与数据持久性的思考。

items.title_en: Trinket.io shutting down, so we saved it and hosted it a trinket.strivemath.org
items.title_zh: Trinket.io 将停运，项目被保存并托管在 trinket.strivemath.org
items.summary_en: When Trinket.io announced shutdown, the community saved and relocated projects to a dedicated domain. The move preserves educational sketches and interactive tutorials for learners and signals the importance of community-led preservation of learning tools.
items.summary_zh: Trinket.io 将停运，社区将部分项目保存并迁移至新域名以继续使用。此举保留了大量教育性代码示例和交互式教程，凸显社区在学习工具保护方面的作用。

items.title_en: Understanding the rationale behind a rule when trying to circumvent it
items.title_zh: 尝试绕过规则时理解背后原因
items.summary_en: Explains why people try to circumvent rules and what that reveals about usability and policy design. It argues that robust systems anticipate common workarounds and provide safer, clearer alternatives rather than simply blocking actions.
items.summary_zh: 本文解析人们为何试图绕过规则，以及这对可用性和政策设计的启示。作者主张，健全的系统应预见常见的变通方式，提供更安全、清晰的替代路径，而非单纯封锁行为。

items.title_en: Show HN: Garden of Flowers – an archive of pictorial typography before ASCII art
items.title_zh: Show HN：Garden of Flowers——ASCII艺术前的 pictorial typography 档案
items.summary_en: Show HN: Garden of Flowers preserves a historical archive of pictorial typography, capturing visual language that predates ASCII art. The archive serves as a resource for designers and researchers studying the evolution of text as imagery and the folk typography of early digital culture.
items.summary_zh: Show HN: Garden of Flowers 收集整理了 ASCII 之前的图像排版的历史档案，记录了以文本为视觉元素的早期设计语言。对设计师和研究者而言，这是研究文字作为图像的演变与早期数字文化民间排版的重要资源。

items.title_en: Hetzner Price Adjustment
items.title_zh: Hetzner 价格调整
items.summary_en: Hetzner updates its pricing for cloud servers and related services, affecting cost calculations for small squads and hobby projects. Users should review the new rates and adjust budgets or workflows accordingly.
items.summary_zh: Hetzner 调整云服务器及相关服务价格，可能影响小型团队和业余项目的成本计算。用户需要审阅新价格并相应调整预算与工作流。

items.title_en: I Love the Computer
items.title_zh: 我爱电脑
items.summary_en: A personal meditation celebrating the beauty and power of computers, weaving hardware, software, and tinkering into a narrative about craft and curiosity. The piece resonates with engineers and hackers who still find joy in solving problems at the metal and code level, not just apps. It serves as a reminder that computing remains a hands-on pursuit with tangible feedback.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇个人随笔，赞美电脑的美与力量，讲述硬件、软件和动手改造如何汇聚成工艺与好奇心的故事。对于仍然沉浸于硬件与代码之解题乐趣的工程师与黑客，这篇文字有共鸣。它提醒人们，计算仍是一门需要动手实践、能获得直接反馈的领域。

items.title_en: Typst 0.15.0
items.title_zh: Typst 0.15.0 版本发布
items.summary_en: Typst 0.15.0 brings new features and fixes to this lightweight document typesetting system, enhancing typography controls and rendering performance. The update tightens alignment, fonts, and automation capabilities for writers.
items.summary_zh: Typst 0.15.0 带来新特性和修复，提升排版控制与渲染性能，改进对齐、字体和自动化能力，方便作者更高效地排版。

items.title_en: Peopleless economy? Not technically impossible
items.title_zh: 无人经济？并非技术上不可能
items.summary_en: An essay argues that a 'peopleless' economy powered by automation and AI isn't technically impossible, though it would require radical shifts in productivity measurement, wealth distribution, and governance. It surveys practical challenges—from consumer demand to ownership models—and suggests policy levers to enable high-automation prosperity without sidelining society.
items.summary_zh: 一篇文章称由自动化和人工智能驱动的“无人经济”并非不可能，但需要在生产率衡量、财富分配和治理方面进行根本性转变。文中分析了从需求端到所有权模式等实际挑战，并提出在高自动化时代实现繁荣的政策杠杆。

items.title_en: Humanity isn't ready for the coming intelligence explosion
items.title_zh: 人类尚未为来临的智能爆炸做好准备
items.summary_en: A provocative piece argues that society and institutions are unprepared for a rapid 'intelligence explosion' driven by AI, warning of governance, workforce, and ethical blind spots. It calls for proactive policy, risk management, and adaptable institutions to keep pace with accelerating AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 一篇有争议的文章警告，社会与机构尚未为快速的‘智能爆炸’做好准备，涉及治理、就业与伦理等盲点。文章倡导前瞻性政策和可适应的治理框架，以应对日益增强的人工智能能力。

items.title_en: US battery manufacturing output continues to break records
items.title_zh: 美国电池制造产出持续刷新纪录
items.summary_en: US battery manufacturing output is hitting new records, driven by accelerating EV production and stationary storage demand. The surge signals a ramp-up of domestic gigafactories and supply-chain scale, with implications for jobs, prices, and national energy security. Continued capacity expansion will depend on critical materials, policy support, and industrial strategy.
items.summary_zh: 美国电池制造产出达到新高，受到电动车和储能需求快速增长的推动。产出激增反映了国内巨型工厂投资和供应链扩张的影响，涉及就业、成本和国家能源安全。未来产能的持续扩张将取决于关键材料、政策支持等因素。

items.title_en: My Homelab AI Dev Platform
items.title_zh: 我的自家实验室 AI 开发平台
items.summary_en: A home-lab enthusiast builds an AI development platform at home, sharing architecture, tooling, and workflows to run experiments privately. The project highlights how hobbyists can DIY scalable AI stacks with consumer hardware while maintaining control over data.
items.summary_zh: 作者在自家实验室搭建了一个 AI 开发平台，分享架构、工具链和私密实验工作流程，展示了普通硬件也能组装可扩展的 AI 栈并保持对数据的掌控。这个案例鼓励爱好者自行构建可重复、可控的 AI 环境。

items.title_en: What job interviews taught me about Kubernetes
items.title_zh: 工作面试教会我的 Kubernetes 实践
items.summary_en: The interviews reveal the real-world complexity of Kubernetes beyond buzzwords—things like RBAC, cluster ops, deployment pipelines, and observability. The author distills actionable lessons on what operators expect and how to present architectural thinking under pressure.
items.summary_zh: 工作面试暴露了 Kubernetes 的现实复杂性，如 RBAC、集群运维、部署流水线和可观测性等，远超宣传。文中提炼出合格运维需要的思维模型和在面试中呈现能力的要点。

items.title_en: Copper transport drug restores memory and clears toxic Alzheimer's proteins
items.title_zh: 铜运输药物能恢复记忆并清除有毒的阿尔茨海默蛋白
items.summary_en: A copper-transport drug showing memory restoration and clearance of toxic Alzheimer's proteins in preclinical work points to a novel therapeutic angle. While early, the result underscores metal-homeostasis biology as a potential avenue for neurodegenerative treatment.
items.summary_zh: 早期研究显示一种铜运输药物在前瞻性实验中能恢复记忆并清除与阿尔茨海默相关的有毒蛋白，提示金属稳态在神经退行性疾病治疗中的潜在方向，尽管仍处于初步阶段。

items.title_en: Why I email complete strangers
items.title_zh: 为何给陌生人发邮件
items.summary_en: Outreach to strangers can unlock unexpected opportunities, insights, and collaborations that aren’t visible through typical networks. The piece argues for purposeful, respectful emailing and offers practical tips for proposing value, setting boundaries, and building genuine connections.
items.summary_zh: 主动给陌生人发邮件可以开启意想不到的机会、洞见与合作，这些往往在常规网络中难以发现。文章主张有目的、尊重的邮件沟通，并提供提出价值、设定边界与建立真诚人际关系的实用要点。

items.title_en: Amazon Announces Multibillion-Dollar Data Center in Missouri
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将在密苏里州建立数十亿美元数据中心
items.summary_en: A multi-billion-dollar Amazon data center project in Missouri signals ongoing cloud and compute expansion, with implications for regional energy infrastructure, jobs, and connectivity. The investment points to continued demand for hyperscale capacity as developers migrate workloads to the cloud and as edge-like regions seek closer proximity to users.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊在密苏里州宣布建设数十亿美元级别的数据中心，显示云计算与大规模计算基础设施的持续扩张。此举将影响当地能源、就业和网络连通性，并反映出对雾计算式近端服务需求的增长。

items.title_en: Fox to buy Roku
items.title_zh: 福克斯拟收购罗克
items.summary_en: Fox's potential acquisition of Roku could reshape streaming distribution, advertising, and platform strategy. The deal would combine Fox's content with Roku's hardware and ad-tech reach, potentially accelerating consolidation in the streaming ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 若交易达成，福克斯收购罗克的举措可能重塑流媒体分发、广告与平台策略，将内容方与硬件、广告技术资源整合，或促成流媒体生态的进一步整合。

items.title_en: Game Engine White Papers: Commander Keen
items.title_zh: 游戏引擎白皮书：Commander Keen
items.summary_en: A set of white papers revisiting the Commander Keen engine, offering historical insight into early platformers' tech choices and how those decisions shaped modern game engines. The notes reveal timeless lessons on rendering, memory management, and toolchains.
items.summary_zh: 一组白皮书回顾 Commander Keen 引擎，揭示早期平台游戏在渲染、内存管理和工具链等方面的技术选择，以及这些决定如何影响现代游戏引擎的演进。

items.title_en: OpenAI Losses Increased Nearly 8X in 2025, with Spending Hitting $34B
items.title_zh: OpenAI 损失在 2025 年近增八倍，支出达 340 亿美元
items.summary_en: OpenAI's financials indicate losses surged nearly eightfold in 2025, with expenditure around $34 billion as the company scales compute, talent, and R&D. The numbers underscore the high cost of building leading AI systems and the ongoing pressure to monetize via products, partnerships, or enterprise offerings.
items.summary_zh: 公开财报显示，OpenAI 2025 年亏损近八倍，支出约 340 亿美元，反映出在计算资源、人才与研发上的巨额投入。数字凸显打造前沿 AI 系统的高成本，以及通过产品化、伙伴关系等方式实现盈利的挑战。

items.title_en: Commodore Callback
items.title_zh: Commodore 回调接口
items.summary_en: A post about Commodore's callback interface, describing a mechanism for event-driven interactions within its ecosystem and how it brings modern programming concepts to a retro platform.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍 Commodore 的回调接口，描述在其生态系统中实现事件驱动交互的机制，以及它如何把现代编程概念带入复古平台。

items.title_en: Salesforce to Acquire Fin (formerly Intercom) for $3.6B
items.title_zh: Salesforce 将以 36 亿美元收购 Fin（前 Intercom）
items.summary_en: Salesforce is acquiring Fin, a customer messaging platform formerly known as Intercom, for $3.6B, a move to deepen its customer engagement stack. The deal signals continued consolidation in CRM and AI-assisted support tools, potentially reshaping competition with Zendesk and other tools.
items.summary_zh: Salesforce 将以36亿美元收购 Fin（前 Intercom），以加强其客户参与工具组合。这笔交易标志着 CRM 与 AI 辅助支持工具领域的持续整合，未来可能对 Zendesk 等竞争对手构成压力。

items.title_en: How TimescaleDB compresses time-series data
items.title_zh: TimescaleDB 如何压缩时序数据
items.summary_en: TimescaleDB compresses time-series data by applying columnar encoding, chunking, and selective compression policies to reduce storage without sacrificing query performance. The approach helps scale IoT and monitoring workloads, often dramatically lowering costs.
items.summary_zh: TimescaleDB 通过列式编码、分块和有选择的压缩策略来降低时序数据的存储需求，同时尽量保持查询性能。此做法有助于扩展物联网与监控场景的负载，通常显著降低成本。

items.title_en: Claude Corps
items.title_zh: Claude Corps（Claude 队）
items.summary_en: Anthropic announces Claude Corps, a scalable framework to manage multiple Claude agents with policy and governance controls for enterprises. The initiative aims to help teams coordinate AI copilots, enforce safety constraints, and scale AI-assisted workflows across organizations.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Corps，为企业提供可扩展的多代理管理框架，具备策略与治理控制，便于协调 AI 助手并对安全约束进行执行。该方案旨在帮助企业在组织内扩展 AI 辅助工作流，同时保障合规性与安全性。

items.title_en: Reviews have become expensive, rewrites have become cheap
items.title_zh: 评论变得昂贵，改写变得便宜
items.summary_en: A concise typology of how modern editing workflows shift heavy burden from reviewers to rewrite steps, noting that while human reviews are expensive, content rewrites—often aided by AI—are becoming cheap and fast.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出编辑与审核的成本正在向前移：人工评审成本高，而在 AI 辅助下的改写却越来越便宜、迅速。它探讨了对出版、软件开发与质量控制的影响，并呼吁在人工智能时代重新设计评审流程。

items.title_en: Vance: Iran can have access to $300B reconstruction fund
items.title_zh: Vance：伊朗可以获得 3,000 亿美元的重建基金
items.summary_en: Senator Vance floated the idea that Iran could access a $300 billion reconstruction fund, highlighting political debate over sanctions relief and the terms under which Iran could fund its own rebuild. The discussion underscores how large-scale sanctions policy intersects with economic incentives and regional security concerns.
items.summary_zh: 参议员 Vance 提出让伊朗获得 3000 亿美元重建基金的设想，凸显在制裁豁免与推动伊朗重建之间的政治博弈，以及经济激励与区域安全之间的微妙关系。

items.title_en: How memory safety CVEs differ between Rust and C/C++
items.title_zh: Rust 与 C/C++ 的内存安全 CVE 差异
items.summary_en: Memory-safety CVEs reveal different risk profiles between Rust and C/C++. Rust's ownership and safer abstractions reduce many classes of vulnerabilities, while C/C++ remain susceptible to use-after-free and unsafe dereferences; the post highlights practical implications for choosing languages in security-sensitive projects.
items.summary_zh: 内存安全漏洞展示了 Rust 与 C/C++ 在风险类型上的差异。Rust 的所有权与更安全的抽象降低了大量漏洞风险，而 C/C++ 仍易出现如使用后释放等问题；这对在安全敏感项目中选用语言具有实际意义。

items.title_en: Dutch children are unusually happy and healthy. Because of this walking ritual?
items.title_zh: 荷兰儿童为何如此快乐健康？或因每日步行仪式
items.summary_en: A Guardian piece links Dutch children's happiness and health to the Avondvierdaagse walking festival, where kids walk several days in a row. The story suggests physical activity, routine, and social engagement drive well-being beyond genetics.
items.summary_zh: 一篇报道将荷兰儿童的幸福与健康与 Avondvierdaagse 长时间步行节联系起来。文章指出持续的日常步行、社交互动和活动量，可能比基因更能解释健康与快乐。

items.title_en: Boot Naked Linux
items.title_zh: 裸机启动 Linux
items.summary_en: A minimalist approach to booting Linux, stripping away optional initramfs or init-time dependencies to showcase a lean, fast startup path. The project emphasizes educational value and potential security benefits of a naked-boot approach.
items.summary_zh: 以极简方式启动 Linux，去除可选的 initramfs 与初始化依赖，展示一种更精简、启动更快的路径。该项目强调此类裸机启动在教育与潜在安全方面的价值。

items.title_en: Openrouter Fusion API
items.title_zh: Openrouter 融合 API
items.summary_en: Openrouter releases a Fusion API to orchestrate multiple models and tools in a single, cohesive interface, simplifying multi-model prompts and data routing. This lowers integration friction for developers building AI-powered apps that need to combine strengths of different systems.
items.summary_zh: Openrouter 发布了融合 API，用于在一个统一接口内编排多种模型和工具，简化多模型提示和数据路由。此举降低了将多种系统组合在一起构建 AI 应用的集成难度。

items.title_en: Improvement in advanced Alzheimer’s disease following high-dose psilocybin
items.title_zh: 高剂量 psilocybin 改善晚期阿尔茨海默病
items.summary_en: A neuroscience study reports improved symptoms in advanced Alzheimer's after high-dose psilocybin, contributing to the emerging research on psychedelics for neurodegenerative diseases.
items.summary_zh: 一项神经科学研究报告称，在高剂量的 psilocybin 治疗后，晚期阿尔茨海默病患者的症状有所改善，为迷幻药在神经退行性疾病治疗领域的研究提供新证据。

items.title_en: Can Europe train a frontier AI model on the compute it owns?
items.title_zh: 欧洲能否用自有算力训练前沿 AI 模型？
items.summary_en: Europe explores training frontier AI models using compute it owns, touching on sovereignty, data governance, and talent investment. The effort signals strategic interest in reducing dependence on US-based hyperscalers for critical AI capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲探索用自己掌握的算力训练前沿 AI 模型，涉及主权、数据治理与人才投资等议题，显示在关键 AI 能力上降低对美资云厂商依赖的战略意图。

items.title_en: Firefox 152 Now Available with JPEG-XL Support
items.title_zh: Firefox 152 现已支持 JPEG-XL
items.summary_en: Firefox 152 ships with JPEG-XL support, enabling superior image compression and quality compared to older formats while preserving lossless capabilities. The move is part of a broader push to modernize web media, reduce bandwidth, and improve user-perceived performance.
items.summary_zh: Firefox 152 引入 JPEG- XL 支持，提供比传统图像格式更高效的压缩与画质，同时支持无损特性。此举是推动网页多媒体现代化、降低带宽消耗、提升用户体验的一环。

items.title_en: Show HN: machine0 – Persistent NixOS VMs You Control from the CLI
items.title_zh: Show HN: machine0 – 你可通过命令行控制的持久化 NixOS 虚拟机
items.summary_en: machine0 provides persistent NixOS VMs controllable entirely from the CLI, emphasizing reproducibility and developer ergonomics. The project aims to simplify ephemeral dev environments while keeping stable configurations under versioned control.
items.summary_zh: machine0 提供可从命令行完全控制的持久化 NixOS 虚拟机，强调可重复性与开发者友好性。该项目旨在简化一次性开发环境，同时让配置保持在版本控制中以实现稳定性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Veterinarian turned founder, AI lawn diagnosis
items.title_zh: 兽医出身的创始人：AI 草坪诊断
items.summary_en: A veterinarian-turned-founder launches an AI-powered lawn diagnosis product, illustrating how domain expertise can spawn niche ML startups. The story covers the pivot, product development, and early lessons in customer validation.
items.summary_zh: 一位从兽医转行的创始人推出了基于 AI 的草坪诊断服务，通过照片识别草坪问题。文章讲述其从临床转向创业的经历以及早期的产品验证教训。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Drafted (YC P26) – Models for residential architecture
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Drafted（YC 第26期）— 为住宅建筑设计的模型
items.summary_en: Drafted from YC's batch 26 presents models geared toward residential architecture, enabling AI-assisted design workflows. The project signals growing interest in applying AI to housing design and planning.
items.summary_zh: Drafted 提供面向住宅建筑的模型，帮助建立 AI 辅助的设计工作流程。这体现了将 AI 应用于住宅设计与规划的日益增长的兴趣和潜力。

items.title_en: Micro Radar: a tiny open-source flight radar for your desk
items.title_zh: 微型雷达：桌面上的极小开源飞行雷达
items.summary_en: A compact, open-source flight radar you can run on a desk, letting hobbyists and researchers visualize nearby air traffic from your home. The project combines affordable sensors, open firmware, and approachable hardware to democratize access to radar-based sensing and data exploration.
items.summary_zh: 一个小型开源飞行雷达，放在桌面即可观测周围的航空流量。该项目结合了廉价传感器、开源固件和易于获取的硬件，降低了雷达探测的门槛，便于爱好者与研究者进行数据探索。

items.title_en: Making glass-to-metal seals for home­made vacuum tubes
items.title_zh: 自制真空管的玻璃-金属密封制作
items.summary_en: A hands-on guide to fabricating glass-to-metal seals for home-made vacuum tubes, detailing material choices, sealing techniques, and the high-voltage rigors involved. It highlights the hobbyist challenges of building vacuum electronics and the precision required for reliable seals.
items.summary_zh: 详细介绍自制真空管的玻璃-金属密封工艺，涵盖材料选择、封装技巧以及高压操作要求，凸显爱好者在自制真空电子设备时对密封可靠性和工艺精度的挑战。

items.title_en: The rise of machine writing is a great opportunity for literature
items.title_zh: 机器写作兴起：文学的伟大机会
items.summary_en: An Atlantic essay argues that machine writing could become a boon for literature, offering new stylistic possibilities and collaborative workflows between humans and AI. It frames AI as a tool for experimentation, prompting authors to rethink process, form, and audience engagement rather than replacing human authorship.
items.summary_zh: 一篇《大西洋》专栏认为，机器写作为文学提供新的风格与协作方式，推动作者在创作过程、形式与读者互动方面进行实验。它将 AI 视为辅助工具，强调人类作者的角色并非被取代。

items.title_en: What every coder should know about gamma (2016)
items.title_zh: 每个程序员都应该知道的伽玛校正
items.summary_en: Gamma correction is essential for accurate color rendering in images and displays, yet it's often misunderstood in software. Understanding these concepts prevents subtle visual bugs in apps.
items.summary_zh: 伽玛校正是图像和显示器色彩正确呈现的关键，但在工程实践中常被误解。文章讲解伽玛曲线、sRGB 等色彩空间的直觉，以及感知线性的重要性，帮助开发者避免界面和图形管线中的颜色失真。理解要点有助于避免应用中的细微视觉错误。

items.title_en: Teenagers Stayed Overnight at Their School and Found Hidden Ancient Roman Ruins
items.title_zh: 在学校过夜的青少年发现隐藏的古罗马遗址
items.summary_en: Overnighting at their Italian school, teenagers discover hidden ancient Roman ruins in a basement, a serendipitous archaeological find. The story highlights how curious students can uncover surprising history in everyday spaces.
items.summary_zh: 在意大利一所学校过夜时，青少年在地下室发现隐藏的古罗马遗址，成为一次意外的考古发现。报道强调好奇心驱使下，日常空间也可能揭示意想不到的历史。

items.title_en: Cohere's First Model for Developers
items.title_zh: Cohere 为开发者推出首个模型
items.summary_en: Cohere launches its first developer-friendly model, designed to simplify access to powerful NLP capabilities via straightforward APIs and pricing. The move signals a shift toward more accessible, hosted LLM solutions for builders who want to integrate language capabilities without managing large models themselves.
items.summary_zh: Cohere 推出面向开发者的首个模型，提供易用的 API 与定价，降低接入强大自然语言处理能力的门槛。这一举措反映了更广泛的趋势：让开发者在不自建大模型的情况下即可嵌入语言能力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Fata – Spaced repetition to fight skill rot from AI coding
items.title_zh: Show HN: Fata — 用间隔重复对抗 AI 编码带来的技能退化
items.summary_en: Fata applies spaced repetition to counteract skill rot from heavy reliance on AI coding assistants. The project suggests a productivity approach that blends AI-assisted coding with deliberate practice to retain real proficiency.
items.summary_zh: Fata 将间隔重复应用于对抗因大量依赖 AI 编码助手带来的技能退化，主张在 AI 辅助编码的同时融入刻意练习以保持真正的熟练度。

items.title_en: Factoring "short-sleeve" RSA keys with polynomials
items.title_zh: 用多项式分解短小 RSA 密钥
items.summary_en: A recent post demonstrates factoring RSA keys with polynomial techniques, highlighting vulnerabilities when keys are insufficiently sized or poorly generated. The result underscores the importance of appropriate key sizes and safe parameter choices to prevent practical attacks. It serves as a reminder that cryptography remains highly dependent on careful implementation.
items.summary_zh: 最新研究演示了利用多项式方法分解 RSA 密钥，暴露在密钥尺寸不足或参数生成不当时的脆弱性。此结果强调了选取合适密钥长度与安全参数的重要性，以及对现代密码学安全实践的持续警示。提醒开发者在实现中保持谨慎。

items.title_en: An O(x)Caml book that runs
items.title_zh: An O(x)Caml 书籍能跑起来
items.summary_en: An experimental OCaml book that runs, enabling readers to execute code examples in place. The project demonstrates how executable textbooks can improve learning and reduce friction for readers exploring functional programming.
items.summary_zh: 一个能够运行的 OCaml 书籍项目，读者可直接在书中执行代码示例。此举展示了可运行教科书在提升学习体验、降低门槛方面的潜力，特别是在函数式编程学习中。

items.title_en: Getting Creative with Perlin Noise Fields
items.title_zh: 用 Perlin 噪声场实现创意效果
items.summary_en: Explores inventive uses of Perlin noise fields for procedural visuals and simulations. The piece dives into layering noise, vector fields, and dynamic mappings to generate organic textures and complex patterns that are cheap to compute.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍在 Perlin 噪声场上的创新用法，聚焦于在程序化视觉和模拟中的应用。通过叠加不同尺度的噪声、构造向量场以及动态映射，实现有机纹理和丰富的运动模式，提升视觉质感且计算成本低。

items.title_en: I hacked into the worst e-bike and fixed it [video]
items.title_zh: 我入侵了最糟糕的电动自行车并修好了它【视频】
items.summary_en: A video documents a hands-on hack of a notoriously unreliable e-bike, where the creator analyzes the firmware, identifies a flaw, and patches a fix to improve reliability and safety. The takeaway is how low-level tinkering and open hardware knowledge can turn an underperforming device into something usable, highlighting the value of firmware transparency and repair culture.
items.summary_zh: 一个视频展示对一辆最差的电动自行车进行返修：分析固件、定位缺陷并实施修补，使其变得更可靠和安全。此事强调了底层动手改装、开放硬件知识在提升设备可用性与修复文化方面的作用。

items.title_en: The 90-year-old idea behind JEPA models: Canonical Correlation Analysis
items.title_zh: JEPA 模型背后的 90 年前思想：Canonical Correlation Analysis
items.summary_en: A retrospective explains that the core idea driving JEPA-style models—finding correlated representations across modalities—dates back to Canonical Correlation Analysis, a 90-year-old statistical method. The post shows how simple, elegant linear alignment ideas still underpin some modern embeddings, with implications for multimodal AI and interpretability.
items.summary_zh: 这篇回顾指出推动 JEPA 模型的核心思路——跨模态相关表示对齐，最早可追溯到 90 年前的 canonical correlation analysis（CCA）。文章展示了简单而优雅的线性对齐思想如何仍然支撑着现代多模态嵌入，并对多模态 AI 的可解释性提出启示。

items.title_en: Chili peppers of the world: cultivars, species, and heat
items.title_zh: 世界辣椒：品种、物种与辣度
items.summary_en: A survey of chili peppers around the world, mapping cultivars and species to heat levels and flavor profiles. It helps readers understand pepper diversity, cultivation considerations, and how heat translates into cuisine across regions.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于全球辣椒的综述，梳理了不同品种与科属、辣度等级及风味差异。帮助读者理解辣椒的多样性、栽培要点，以及各地域料理中辣味的差异。

items.title_en: Honeypot Design
items.title_zh: honeypot 设计
items.summary_en: A practical guide to honeypot design, covering how to structure deception, data capture, and threat modeling to attract and study attackers while minimizing risk to your network. The piece offers actionable patterns for building safe, effective decoys in security research and defense.
items.summary_zh: 关于蜜罐（honeypot）设计的实用指南，讨论如何通过设计欺骗、数据采集与威胁建模来吸引并研究攻击者，同时降低自家网络的风险。给出在安全研究与防御中可落地的可行做法。

items.title_en: Show HN: SharkClean MCP
items.title_zh: Show HN：SharkClean MCP
items.summary_en: Show HN presenting SharkClean MCP, an open-source controller for a robotic cleaner. The project demonstrates practical embedded systems design with modular components and real-time control ideas readers can reuse.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：SharkClean MCP——一个开源的机器人清洁设备控制器。该项目展示了实用的嵌入式系统设计，具有模块化组件和可复用的实时控制思路。

items.title_en: Conquering Recursion (2019)
items.title_zh: 征服递归（2019）
items.summary_en: A 2019 piece exploring recursion, breaking down the concept, common pitfalls, and practical patterns for programmers. It aims to demystify recursive thinking and show how divide-and-conquer approaches scale to real problems.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇 2019 年的文章，剖析递归的基本思想、常见误区以及在实际编程中的应用模式。作者意在揭开递归思维的神秘，展示分治策略如何在现实问题中落地。
